changes.old: I dissembled by whistling a Verdi tune into the wind
changes.new: I dissembled by whistling a cabaletta by Verdi into the wind
changes.reason: Restores Gemini's precise operatic term 'cabaletta by Verdi'; the final flattened cabaletta to the generic 'tune,' losing the musicological specificity.
changes.context_sentence: tion and bestial menace. I dissembled by whistling a cabaletta by Verdi into the wind that roared about me.  I
